title: Selaggis VI
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Selaggis VI |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]] |system=[[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis system]]''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' |coordinates=N-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1: [[Selaggis]] |orbited= |position= |moons=*Several [[Moon/Legends|moons]] **[[Selcaron]] *Heavy [[Asteroid/Legends|debris]] [[Planetary ring/Legends|ring]] |routes=[[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=[[Gas giant/Legends|Gas giant]] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=Constant storm activity |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Zsinj's Empire]] }} {{Quote|Where do I know the name Selaggis from?''"
"''Another Zsinj strike zone. One of the first I looked at after I assumed command of this task force. One of the moons of Selaggis Six was colonized. I guess Zsinj decided to make a lesson of someone colonizing on his border without his permission. ''Iron Fist'' wiped out the whole colony. I think it would be very appropriate if he were wiped out in the same system.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and Han Solo|}} '''Selaggis VI''', or '''Selaggis Six''', commonly known as '''Selaggis''', was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located in the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. ==Description== {{Quote|Selaggis Six is the perfect place for Zsinj to make a stand. He can use the terrain to his advantage. An asteroid ring to hide in, a planetary atmosphere he might even be able to bring ''Iron Fist'' into for cover.|Han Solo, to [[Onoma]]|}} Selaggis VI was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located within the [[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis system]] of the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]], a part of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It lay on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]], which connected it to the [[Bandomeer system/Legends|Bandomeer]] and [[Vahaba system/Legends|Vahaba systems]]. Selaggis VI was one of the seven [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Selaggis]]. The planet was orbited by several [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Selcaron]], and was also circled by a heavy [[Asteroid/Legends|debris]] [[Planetary ring/Legends|ring]] thought to have been another moon at one [[Time/Legends|time]]. Selaggis VI was a beautiful yellow-orange [[Gas/Legends|gas]] giant with an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] characterized by constant storm activity. The storms unceasingly changed the planet's patterns of swirls and lines of color, so that each new [[Local day/Legends|day]] offered variations in the worldscape, making it an ever-changing work of art for the [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]] on Selcaron. ==History== {{Quote|Zsinj is trapped at Selaggis.|Han Solo|}} Selaggis VI was the site of the [[Battle of Selaggis]] between [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|You saw what the ''Iron Fist'' did on Selaggis. It turned the whole colony into rubble.|Han Solo|''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''}} [[File:Planet04-SWR.png|thumb|right|250px|Selaggis in ''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] Selaggis was introduced in the [[1994]] novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', written by [[Dave Wolverton]], which mentioned it as the location of a [[Unidentified colony (Selcaron)|colony]] that was [[Attack on Selcaron|obliterated]] by Warlord Zsinj's [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]. Selaggis then appeared in the [[1998]] PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']], which described it as a planet with a "favorable climate that has attracted colonists."[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] The [[1999]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'', written by [[Aaron Allston]], later identified the planet as the gas giant Selaggis Six, and [[Retroactive continuity|changed]] the location of the colony to one of its moons, Selcaron. The [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' finally identified the planet as Selaggis VI.{{CSWECite|III|136|Selaggis, Battle of}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{1str}} *''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Ret}} {{1stID|Selaggis Six|in book}} *''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} *''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' *[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Rebellion'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{GamerCite|8|Jedi Mind Tricks}} *{{InsiderCite|59|Who's Who in Rogue Squadron}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|Selaggis VI}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[Galaxy at War]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-1|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Selaggis VI }} [[Category:Gas giants]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Selaggis system locations]] [[Category:Zsinj's Empire planets]]
